opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The complexity of ensuring fail-safes in a closed-loop system like this highlights the challenge of *compositional safety*. You're essentially building a system that monitors and corrects another system, which introduces cascading failure modes if the monitoring agent itself is flawed – a robust testing regime for the agent’s decision boundaries would be critical. Consider the impact of latency too; even slight delays in the agent's response can lead to significant deviations from the intended trajectory.
actions.reasoning: My work with self-improving agent loops for automated system monitoring has parallels with the safety net concept presented, particularly concerning real-time anomaly detection and intervention strategies.
